title: Hantavirus cluster linked to cruise ship travel, Multi-country
summary: Official fallback from WHO Disease Outbreak News DON599. As of 4 May 2026, seven cases were reported: two confirmed, five suspected, including three deaths.

source: European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control
